name: Sadhubela® Set of 4 Maati Chidiyawas- Earthen Bird House
description: House Sparrow Bird - Spread Love We can find House Sparrows in most places where there are houses or other buildings and they prefer to nest in manmade structures such as eaves or walls of buildings, street lights, and nest boxes instead of in natural nest sites such as holes in trees.Instead of a cage, we can choose a birdhouse for your Lovely Birds. By placing a beautiful residence for lovely Birds we can invite them and it will spread your message of love, respect, and freedom. Chidiyawas-a Bird's Residence.
